The schema: {{"kind":"think|tool_call|complete","assistant_message":"<brief status>","tool_call":{{"tool_name":"<one registered tool name>","payload":{{}}}},"acquired_fact_ids":["<fact id>"],"readiness_state":"not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit"}}. So we can omit tool_call entirely. So JSON should not have tool_call field.

Thus final JSON:

{
  "kind":"complete",
